title: duval-jouvea maritima
intro: Duval-jouvea maritima, also known as the Sea Purslane, is a succulent plant species native to the coastal regions of Australia. It possesses medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which can help protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. The health benefits of Duval-jouvea maritima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a valuable addition to traditional remedies. Herbal preparations of Duval-jouvea maritima are often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
